modifier_text:
Assume that the ticket was created by an end user through a self-service form submission and that the person who created it speaks English as their first language.
You should write the description in a narrative style and use a casual conversational tone. The writing should have reasonable amount of detail and show strong technical proficiency. There should be several noticeable typos and some irrelevant details included.
raw_text:
short_description_text: Need help using headings in Grackle Docs.

full_description_text:  
So, I was trying to figure out how to use headings in Grackle Docs, but I just can't seem to get it right. I mean, I thought it would be straightforward, but every time I try to format a heading, it just doesn't look like what I expected. It's super frustrating because I want my document to look professional, but I'm stuck here not knowing what to do.
short_description: Need help using headings in Grackle Docs.
